title: Monaco Victory: The Moment That Changed Everything
storyline: Open on the Monaco harbor at dawn. Cut to the RaceBird being lowered into the water. Pit crew final checks. Phelim in the cockpit, helmet on. Race start sequence. The overtake on lap 3. Crossing the finish line. Team celebration on the dock. Virat embracing the crew. Close on the TBR flag against the Monaco skyline.
hook: Nobody gave us a chance in Monaco.
cta: Follow the journey. Team Blue Rising.

scenes.title: Dawn in Monaco
scenes.description: Wide shot of Monaco harbor at sunrise. Mist on the water. The RaceBird silhouette.
scenes.voiceover: Nobody gave us a chance in Monaco.
scenes.visualNotes: Golden hour lighting. Drone shot pulling back from harbor.

scenes.title: Preparation
scenes.description: Pit crew preparing the RaceBird. Final system checks. Phelim suiting up.
scenes.voiceover: But we had something they did not. We had a team that believed.
scenes.visualNotes: Close-ups of hands, equipment, focused faces.

scenes.title: The Race
scenes.description: Race start. Pack racing. The critical overtake on lap 3.
scenes.visualNotes: Onboard camera mixed with drone. Speed and spray.

scenes.title: Victory
scenes.description: Crossing the finish line. Team eruption on the dock. Virat embracing the crew.
scenes.voiceover: This is what rising looks like.
scenes.visualNotes: Slow motion celebration. TBR flag raised.

scenes.title: Close
scenes.description: TBR flag against Monaco skyline. Logo and CTA.
scenes.textOverlay: Follow the journey. Team Blue Rising.

posts.title: Monaco Victory Carousel
posts.caption: From underdogs to champions. The story of our first E1 victory in Monaco, told in five frames.

The overtake.","visual":"Race action shot"},{"slide":4,"text":"The moment it changed.","visual":"Crossing finish line"},{"slide":5,"text":"This is what rising looks like.","visual":"Team celebration"}]
